blocks.title: 📒 FRASES CLAVE · teléfono y email
blocks.intro: Frases útiles para el trabajo remoto. Apréndelas, luego practica con los ejercicios y los audios.

cells.body:
Do you have a minute?
Are you available?
Let me check that for you.

Could you confirm the details?
Can you send me…?
It's attached to the email.

I'm waiting for an update.
There's a task pending.
I'll get back to you soon.

price estimate = cotización
request = solicitud
'attach' = adjuntar (un archivo)

blocks.note: Cómo funciona: primero une 🔗 el vocabulario, después escucha 🎧 y completa 📝 los emails. ✓ CHECK en cada uno.

blocks.title: ★ THE STORY · GREENMARKET
blocks.intro: Sigues una historia de trabajo remoto: un nuevo cliente (GreenMarket) pide una cotización para su web.

cast.sp: la team lead
su compañero
el cliente (GreenMarket)

blocks.title: UNE VOCABULARIO E INGLÉS
blocks.intro: Toca la palabra en inglés y luego su significado.

blocks.title: AUDIO 1 · THE VIDEO CALL
blocks.desc: Sofia llama a Marcos. ¿Cuál es el problema con el cliente?
blocks.speakers: 🗣 Sofia + Marcos

options: A price estimate for a website

questions.q: Why isn't the price estimate ready yet?
options: Marcos is waiting for an update from the client

questions.q: Sofia offers to call the client to check.

speaking.prompt: Explain the problem with the price estimate. Use pending and waiting for an update.
speaking.starter: The estimate isn't ready because there's a task pending — Marcos is…

transcript.html: Hi Marcos, do you have a minute? Are you available for a quick call?
Hi Sofia, sure, I'm available. Is everything OK?
It's about GreenMarket, the new client. They sent us a request this morning. They want a price estimate for the website today.
OK. I already have most of the details. The estimate is almost ready.
Is it attached to your email? I didn't see it.
Not yet, sorry. There's still one task pending. I'm waiting for an update from the client.
Ah, so that's the issue. Let me check that for you. I'll call them now.
Thanks, Sofia! I'll get back to you soon.

blocks.title: COMPLETA EL EMAIL / LA LLAMADA
blocks.intro: Elige la palabra correcta para cada frase de trabajo.

items.q: I'll ___ you the price estimate today.
I'm ___ for an update from the client.
The product list is ___ to my email.

blocks.title: AUDIO 2 · THE CLIENT CALL
blocks.desc: Marcos llama a David para confirmar los detalles del proyecto.
blocks.speakers: 🗣 Marcos + David

questions.q: What does David want to add to the project?
What happens to the price estimate with the payment system?
The team can start next Monday if David confirms today.

speaking.prompt: Why is the price estimate higher now? Explain in 1–2 sentences.
speaking.starter: Because the client also wants an online payment system, so…

transcript.html: Hi David, this is Marcos from the web team. Thanks for the product list. Do you have a minute?
Hi Marcos! Yes, of course. Did you get everything you need?
Almost. I have the details, but do you need the online payment system too?
Yes, please. The payment system is very important for us.
Perfect. With the payment system, the price estimate is a little higher.
That's OK. Could you send me the final price estimate today?
Of course. It will be attached to my email this afternoon.
Great. And when can you start?
If you confirm today, we can start next Monday.

blocks.title: ✍️ A SHORT WORK EMAIL
blocks.intro: Escribe un email corto (4–6 frases) a un cliente o compañero:
checklist: Saluda y di por qué escribes
Usa 2 palabras nuevas (price estimate, request, attached, pending…)
Pide o confirma algo (Could you confirm…?)
Cierra: I'll get back to you soon.
blocks.example: Hi David, Thank you for your request. The price estimate is almost ready — I'm just waiting for one update. I attached the product list to this email. Could you confirm the details? I'll get back to you soon. Best, Marcos
blocks.hw: Escribe tu email y envíamelo por WhatsApp para corregirlo juntos.
